overview: HBeam is a messaging and payments app built for the Hoosat blockchain. Users can generate or import a wallet, add contacts by Hoosat address, exchange instant messages with typing indicators and read receipts, and send HTN payments that are tracked from broadcast to blockchain confirmation.
features: Wallet generation and import with encrypted private key storage
Real-time chat with 2-second polling, typing indicators, and read receipts
HTN payment messages with status tracking: pending → broadcasted → confirmed
